meaning: n.亚诺河(位在意大利中部)
examples: The Ognissanti is a beautiful church on the other side of the Arno river.
Other well-known rivers include the Tiber, Adige and Arno.
Then another cousin, Arno Lustiger, bent over the coffin to recite Kaddish.
But if the apertivo does not fill you up, head over the Arno River to the Oltrarno.
Sto lounge bar and restaurant at the Westin Excelsior hotel sits right on the Arno River.
